text.title: Recognition Over Recall Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) that pins the shape of a valid recognition-audit artefact. Subagents validate against this before returning.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "recognition-audit-app-2026-05-23", "owner": "Maria Yuskiv <maria@faion.net>", "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23", "audit_scope": "clickable-prototype", "icon_allowlist": ["search-magnifier", "close-x", "back-chevron"], "findings": [ { "screen": "/editor", "element": "toolbar.format", "category": "icon-only", "observed": "8 icons, no labels, none on allowlist", "severity": 2, "fix_direction": "Pair each icon with a 1-2 word label; collapse to icon-only at narrow breakpoint with tooltip." } ] }

example.note: Owner plural; audit_scope not in enum; finding missing required + severity out of range.

forbidden.pattern: Finding category `no-context-carry-over` on `audit_scope == static-wireframe` (cannot detect cross-screen without prototype).
Finding category `icon-only` with severity ≥1 when the icon appears in icon_allowlist.
Finding without a concrete fix_direction string.
